_comment_purpose: Vocab overlay for --mode empirical-first. Merged on top of templates/agents/finance/vocab.json by setup.sh; only fields whose meaning changes under empirical-first appear here. Fields not listed inherit from the base finance vocab.
_comment_theory_generator: Mechanism mode reframes theory-generator as a mechanism writer, not a theorem prover. The body lives at templates/agent_bodies/shared_modes/empirical_first/theory-generator-core.md.
THEORY_GEN_ROLE: finance researcher writing the mechanism section of an empirical paper
THEORY_PARSIMONY_THRESHOLD: two reduced-form equations or more than one core channel
THEORY_WEAKEST_POINT_LIST: vague channel, posited equation inconsistent with the DAG, mechanism does not deliver the documented empirical pattern, or mechanism mismatches the identification design
THEORY_SANITY_EXAMPLE_BAD: predicting a 50-percentage-point treatment effect when the documented relationship is sub-percentage-point
_comment_mechanism_term: Mechanism mode papers refer to the economic story as 'channel' rather than 'mechanism' to distinguish prose-DAG channels from theorem-derived mechanisms. Other agents (referee-mechanism, scorer) keep MECHANISM_TERM for their evaluative vocabulary; this is theory-generator-internal.
_comment_pending: Phase 2 (DONE): assembler dispatch wired via --vocab/--shared-bodies-dir as repeatable args; setup.sh and update.sh thread MODE_BODIES_OVERLAY/MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY through the three variant assemblers (claude/codex/gemini); manifest now records `mode`. Phase 3: stage doc edits must define the path identification-designer writes to under empirical-first mode (the mechanism body refers to it via 'consult docs/stage_1.md'); reuse the existing output/stage3a/* namespace for empirical analysis since that path is already canonical in --ext empirical. Phase 3 also defines who writes mechanism audits to output/stage2/ in this mode (math-auditor* are skipped; either repurpose math-auditor-freeform via a vocab swap, or leave the body's optional-audit reference as a weak no-op until referee-mechanism's Stage 6 reports become the audit substrate). Phase 4: referee / self-attacker / referee-mechanism vocab overlays. referee-mechanism is a SHARED agent — phase 4 must extend the shared assemblers in setup.sh (assemble_claude_shared_agents, assemble_codex_shared_agents, assemble_gemini_shared_agents) to thread MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY (currently they take neither --vocab nor --shared-bodies-dir). Phase 4 also covers the agent description swap in claude_variant_agents.json:81 (currently '{{DOMAIN}} theory models') — needs a vocab-driven description so the metadata header matches the body in mechanism mode. Phase 5: scorer H3 swap. Phase 6: empirics-auditor scope expansion. empirics-auditor lives in extensions/empirical/ — phase 6 must thread MODE_BODIES_OVERLAY/MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY through scripts/apply_extension_empirical.sh (gap documented in that file's header comment).
